methodology: Pricing scraped from public websites where available (Direct Funeral Services, 1Last, Embrace, Casket Fairprice, Serenity Casket partials). Traditional parlours (Ang Chin Moh, Singapore Casket, Trinity, Nam Shan) do not publish — estimates derived from Google review customer claims, ST/CNA funeral cost articles (2023-2025), industry reports (Straits Times 'cost of dying' series), and MOH death certificate records (~24,000 SG deaths p.a., ~65% embalmed/wake, ~35% direct cremation). Digital-first SG entrants verified as active Apr 2026. Family-served estimates use death-cert share * known parlour market-share chatter. Every 'hidden_estimated' pricing_flag means the number is a triangulated mid-point, not a quote.

categories.sg_traditional_parlour: Incumbent SG casket / funeral service companies, phone-first, quote-on-call, full-service (wake + cremation + hearse).
categories.sg_digital_startup: Digital-first SG bereavement platforms with online ordering, transparent pricing, memorial pages, or admin workflow.
categories.sg_religious_community: Temple-, church-, mosque-, or clan-run funeral/columbarium services with religious-rites bundling.
categories.cross_border_specialist: Regional (MY/ID/TH) columbarium, memorial park, or ash-placement operators that SG families use for final resting place.
categories.memorial_platform: Global digital-only platforms for memorial pages, online obituaries, fundraising, and legacy content — no physical service.
categories.admin_specialist: Post-death administrative specialists: estate administration, probate, digital wills, CPF/bank closure, will-writing SaaS.
categories.livestream_specialist: Vendors whose primary offering is virtual wake / funeral livestream production (camera, RTMP, private URL).
categories.diy_alt: DIY and community alternatives: WhatsApp family arrangements, printed obituaries only, direct cremation with no ceremony.

competitors.name: Singapore Casket Company
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese middle-to-upper-middle families seeking full 3-5 day traditional Buddhist/Taoist wake at Lavender Street parlour
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's oldest funeral parlour (est. 1920) with Lavender Street flagship — trusted multi-generational brand for Chinese traditional rites.
strengths: Owns Lavender Street parlour (premium wake venue in SG)
Full vertical: casket, embalming, hearse, rites masters, cremation coordination
weaknesses: Quote-on-call pricing opaque to under-50 SG consumers
Website is brochure-ware, no online ordering or memorial page
Brand associated with 'expensive' — loses bereaved younger customers to value brands

competitors.name: Ang Chin Moh Funeral Directors
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese families seeking 'dignified' mid-premium traditional funeral with professional funeral director
competitors.primary_value_prop: 5th-generation family funeral director brand marketed on dignity, aftercare and bereavement counselling.
strengths: Strong founder personal brand (Ang Ziqian — author, thought leader, grief-literacy speaker)
weaknesses: No public pricing — blocks comparison shopping
No online booking or digital memorial page
High price point (~S$10-14K) excludes cost-conscious segment

competitors.name: Direct Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG value-seeking families of all faiths wanting transparent-priced funeral without luxury markup
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singapore's best-known transparent-pricing funeral service — all-in packages listed online by faith and day-count.
strengths: Fully public pricing — rare in SG industry
Strong SEO for 'funeral package price Singapore'
weaknesses: Website dated, feels 2015; no memorial page or livestream bundle
Perceived as 'budget' by upper-middle Chinese families

competitors.name: Serenity Casket
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese Buddhist/Taoist families wanting value full-service wake with visible price anchors
competitors.primary_value_prop: Mid-market Buddhist/Taoist specialist with semi-public pricing and 24/7 WhatsApp intake.
strengths: WhatsApp-first intake faster than call centres
weaknesses: No online checkout — still phone/WhatsApp confirmation
No memorial page or livestream bundle

competitors.name: Trinity Casket
competitors.target_market: SG Christian and multi-faith families seeking pastor-led wake and church-venue coordination
competitors.primary_value_prop: Christian-leaning funeral director with strong church-venue logistics and pastor network.
strengths: Established Christian market share in SG

competitors.name: Singapore Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG families wanting generic-sounding 'any faith' SEO-driven funeral booker
competitors.primary_value_prop: SEO-optimised aggregator-style brand competing on visibility and 24-hour hotline.
weaknesses: Upsell gap between $3,688 starting and typical $8K out-the-door
No post-funeral admin, memorial page, or livestream

competitors.name: Casket Fairprice
competitors.target_market: SG cost-conscious families wanting budget Buddhist/Taoist 1-3 day wake
competitors.primary_value_prop: Budget challenger with aggressively low starting price and published menu.
strengths: Lowest published starting price in SG market
weaknesses: Brand name invites lawsuit risk from NTUC (no affiliation) — reputational fragility

competitors.name: Nam Shan Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG Hokkien/Teochew/Cantonese families wanting clan-association-aligned traditional rites
competitors.primary_value_prop: Dialect-group-rooted funeral director specialising in traditional clan rites and columbarium coordination.

competitors.name: Singapore Buddhist Federation Funeral Services
competitors.target_market: SG devout Buddhist families wanting temple-coordinated monk-led rites and federation-linked columbarium
competitors.primary_value_prop: Federation-backed funeral coordination linking monk-led rites, temple venue, and columbarium placement.
strengths: Monk-led rites authenticity unmatched by commercial parlours
Temple venues at subsidised rates to members
weaknesses: Slow digital adoption; coordination via phone/temple visit

competitors.name: Singapore Muslim (Majlis Ugama) Burial Services
competitors.target_market: SG Muslim families requiring same-day Janazah burial at Choa Chu Kang Muslim Cemetery
competitors.primary_value_prop: MUIS-coordinated same-day Janazah preparation and CCK Muslim cemetery burial — regulated pricing.
strengths: Religious monopoly for Muslim burial in SG
weaknesses: No memorial / admin / livestream layer (not religiously applicable in same way)

competitors.name: Singapore Hindu Endowments Board (Mandai Crematorium)
competitors.target_market: SG Hindu families requiring priest-led antyesti rites and Mandai crematorium booking
competitors.primary_value_prop: Hindu Endowments Board coordination for priest-led rites and Mandai crematorium slots.
weaknesses: No digital memorial or admin support

competitors.name: 1Last (Embrace)
competitors.target_market: English-first NextGen SG families (35-55) pre-planning or coordinating parent funeral online
competitors.primary_value_prop: Digital-first SG funeral booker with transparent packages and pre-planning flow.

competitors.name: Embrace Life
competitors.target_market: SG pre-planners and bereaved seeking 'celebration of life' modern funeral with curated aesthetics
competitors.primary_value_prop: Celebration-of-life brand with curated floral, non-traditional venue, and modern aesthetic.
strengths: Partnerships with hotels and event venues
weaknesses: High price point excludes budget segment

competitors.name: Funeral Solutions SG
competitors.target_market: SG families wanting a single aggregator with quote-compare across multiple parlour partners
competitors.primary_value_prop: Aggregator-style broker connecting families to 5-8 partner parlours with standardised packages.
weaknesses: Aggregator trust tax — customers still feel reroute

competitors.name: Nirvana Asia (SG)
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese families buying pre-need columbarium niches and ancestral placement in MY memorial parks
competitors.primary_value_prop: Asia's largest listed death-care group — pre-need niches, feng-shui-graded columbarium, ancestral tablet placement.
strengths: Massive land bank (MY + SG + ID) for niches
weaknesses: Primarily niche-sale business, weak on the wake itself

competitors.name: Nirvana Memorial Park (Malaysia)
competitors.target_market: SG Chinese families choosing Malaysia columbarium/ancestral placement over pricier SG niches
competitors.primary_value_prop: Premium MY memorial park attracting SG families priced out of SG columbarium market.
weaknesses: Not applicable for the wake itself

competitors.name: Mount Vernon Sanctuary (NEA-managed SG columbarium)
competitors.target_market: SG families wanting government-priced niches at Choa Chu Kang / Mandai columbarium
competitors.primary_value_prop: Government-regulated cheapest niches for SG residents at NEA-run columbaria.

competitors.name: Keeper
competitors.target_market: Global English-speaking families wanting a private digital memorial page with contributions and obituary
competitors.primary_value_prop: Modern, private digital memorial page — photos, stories, obituary, timeline.
weaknesses: Zero service layer (no wake, no admin)

competitors.name: Forever.com
competitors.target_market: Digital-legacy families buying lifetime cloud storage for photos/videos tied to a deceased loved one
competitors.primary_value_prop: Permanent cloud storage for digital legacy — photos, videos, documents guaranteed across generations.
weaknesses: Price point confusing to SG families

competitors.name: Ever Loved
competitors.target_market: Global English-speaking families running a memorial fundraiser + obituary + event page
competitors.primary_value_prop: Free memorial + obituary + fundraising platform with funeral crowdfunding built in.
weaknesses: Fundraising-centric UX doesn't fit SG Chinese norms

competitors.name: GatheringUs
competitors.target_market: Global families hosting a virtual memorial ceremony with facilitator and tribute slideshow
competitors.primary_value_prop: Facilitator-run virtual memorial services with professional tribute production.

competitors.name: MyKeeper / Legacy.com
competitors.target_market: Newspaper-syndicated obituary audience looking for a permanent online obituary + guestbook
competitors.primary_value_prop: Largest obituary syndication network with permanent online guestbook.

competitors.name: WillCraft
competitors.target_market: SG adults writing a legally valid will online (pre-death), including digital assets and guardianship
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG's leading DIY online will-writer — legally valid wills in under 30 minutes.
strengths: Strong SEO on 'write a will Singapore'

competitors.name: Immortalize SG
competitors.target_market: SG adults wanting estate-planning-meets-legacy: will, advance care directive, and digital legacy
competitors.primary_value_prop: Unified SG platform for wills, ACDs, lasting power of attorney, and digital legacy.

competitors.name: Lexxo (by Drew & Napier / alternates)
competitors.target_market: SG families needing a lawyer-assisted probate / letters-of-administration filing
competitors.primary_value_prop: Lawyer-led probate specialist with semi-public flat-fee ranges for letters-of-administration.
strengths: Flat-fee transparency rare in SG legal
weaknesses: Only engages post-funeral — no wake coordination

competitors.name: Estate Administrator Singapore
competitors.target_market: SG families needing CPF nomination claim, HDB transfer, and bank-account closure after death
competitors.primary_value_prop: Focused post-death administrative specialist handling CPF claims, HDB transfers, and bank closures.
strengths: Exact niche overlap with Passage's admin module
weaknesses: Cold outreach only after family Googles; no pre-built funnel
No wake/memorial bundle — must be stitched to a parlour

competitors.name: One Last Gift
competitors.target_market: SG families with overseas relatives needing professional wake livestream + recording
competitors.primary_value_prop: Specialist SG wake-livestream vendor with multi-camera setup and private viewing link.

competitors.name: Farewell Livestream SG (independent A/V vendors)
competitors.target_market: Budget SG families booking a freelance A/V operator for wake livestream
competitors.primary_value_prop: Budget single-operator livestream for SG wakes — often a wedding A/V freelancer pivoting.

competitors.name: Tribute Reel SG
competitors.target_market: SG families commissioning a memorial slideshow / tribute video for the wake
competitors.primary_value_prop: Rapid 48-hour turnaround memorial slideshow / tribute video for wake-time playback.

competitors.name: DIY family WhatsApp + Google Photos
competitors.target_market: Tech-comfortable SG families choosing direct cremation and self-managing coordination via messaging apps
competitors.primary_value_prop: DIY coordination: WhatsApp family group + Google Photos album + direct cremation booking — zero vendor fees beyond cremation.
weaknesses: Grief + logistics burden falls entirely on family

competitors.name: Direct cremation via NEA (no wake)
competitors.target_market: Secular and cost-minimising SG families choosing Mandai direct cremation without wake or parlour
competitors.primary_value_prop: Absolute-minimum-cost farewell — NEA Mandai cremation, no wake, no parlour.
